---
name: 📍 Suggest a place
about: Add a real, visited place to the map (no code needed)
title: "[place] "
labels: new-place, content
---

## Place name
<!-- RU and EN if you can. -->
- RU:
- EN:

## Coordinates
<!-- Right-click in https://www.openstreetmap.org → Show address → copy lat, lon. -->
- Lat:
- Lon:

## Category
<!-- Pick one: nature, hiking, museum, attraction, village, city, reserve, restaurant -->

## Description (1–3 sentences, from your own visit)
<!-- No copy-paste from Wikipedia. Write like a friend giving a tip. -->

## Best months to visit
<!-- e.g. "May–Sep, peak in July" — and why. -->

## Why is this worth a detour?
<!-- One sentence. The "so what?" -->

## Hazards / things to know
<!-- Closed roads, no signal, dangerous in winter, fee, permit needed, etc. -->

## Source / proof of visit
<!-- A link to your own photo, social post, GPX track, anything. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I have personally visited this place
- [ ] The description is in my own words
- [ ] I checked that this place isn't already on the map
